copilot-adapter.provider.deepseek.apiKey: Your DeepSeek API key. Keys start with 'sk-'.
Your MiniMax API key. Keys start with 'sk-'.
copilot-adapter.provider.minimax.apiEndp: Select the API endpoint for MiniMax.
copilot-adapter.provider.qwen.apiKey.des: Your Alibaba DashScope API key for Qwen. Keys start with 'sk-'.
copilot-adapter.provider.qwen.apiEndpoin: Qwen API endpoint URL. Leave empty for CN: https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1 | US: https://dashscope-us.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1 | SGP: https://{WorkspaceId}.ap-southeast-1.maas.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1 | EU: https://{WorkspaceId}.eu-central-1.maas.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1. Replace {WorkspaceId} with your actual workspace ID.
copilot-adapter.provider.zhipu.apiKey.de: Your Zhipu API key for the GLM series.
copilot-adapter.provider.zhipu.apiEndpoi: Select the API endpoint for the Zhipu provider.
copilot-adapter.provider.moonshot.apiKey: Your Moonshot API key for the Kimi series. Keys start with 'sk-'.
copilot-adapter.provider.moonshot.apiEnd: Select the API endpoint for Moonshot.
copilot-adapter.provider.mimo.apiEndpoin: Select the API endpoint for the MIMO provider.
copilot-adapter.walkthrough.title: AI Models Adapter for Copilot Chat
copilot-adapter.walkthrough.description: Set up AI models in Copilot Chat.
copilot-adapter.walkthrough.apiKey.title: Add a model provider
copilot-adapter.walkthrough.apiKey.descr:
Two methods are available. The Language Models panel is the recommended native approach.
[Open Language Models](command:workbench.action.chat.manage) · [Add API Key](command:copilot-adapter.addApiKey)
copilot-adapter.walkthrough.showModels.d:
Language models may be hidden by default. Open the VS Code Language Models panel to make them visible.
[Open Language Models](command:workbench.action.chat.manage)
copilot-adapter.walkthrough.advancedSett:
Fine-tune provider settings, set up a vision proxy, or enable experimental features.
[Open settings](command:copilot-adapter.openSettings)
Route image attachments through a vision-capable model so text-only models can handle them.
[Configure Vision Proxy](command:copilot-adapter.setVisionProxyModel)
copilot-adapter.config.title: AI Models Adapter
copilot-adapter.config.maxTokens.descrip: Cap on output tokens per request. Use 0 for the provider's default (no limit). Lower values help manage costs.
copilot-adapter.config.debug.description:
Controls diagnostic output level. Token usage is always reported to Copilot.

- `off` - no output
- `info` - metadata only, safe to share
- `meta` - adds model id, apiId and endpoint details
- `verbose` - most detailed diagnostic output
copilot-adapter.config.debug.off.label: Off
copilot-adapter.config.debug.off.descrip: No output logged. Token usage is always reported to Copilot.
copilot-adapter.config.debug.info.label: Info
copilot-adapter.config.debug.info.descri: Logs request metadata to the output channel - model, endpoint, tool names. No prompt content. Safe to include in issue reports. [View Logs](command:copilot-adapter.showLogs)
copilot-adapter.config.debug.meta.label: Meta
copilot-adapter.config.debug.meta.descri: Extends Info with model id, apiId, endpoint and partial key. Safe to share. [View Logs](command:copilot-adapter.showLogs)
copilot-adapter.config.debug.verbose.des: Full diagnostic output to the output channel — model, endpoint, tools, and detailed request metadata. [View Logs](command:copilot-adapter.showLogs)
Vision proxy model for image attachments. Enter `off` to disable. [Choose from available models](command:copilot-adapter.setVisionProxyModel).
copilot-adapter.config.visionProxyPrompt: System prompt given to the vision proxy when converting image attachments to text descriptions.
copilot-adapter.config.requestTimeout.de: HTTP request timeout in seconds. Set to 0 to disable the timeout.
copilot-adapter.config.requestRetries.de: Number of automatic retries on rate-limited (429) or unavailable (503) responses. Retries use exponential back-off and only occur before any content is streamed.
copilot-adapter.config.imageTokenEstimat: Estimated token cost per image used when counting tokens for context-window tracking.
copilot-adapter.config.maxWarmupRounds.d: Maximum tool warmup rounds per request when tool warmup is enabled.
copilot-adapter.config.toolWarmup.descri: Send fake activate_* tool calls to the model before the real request, to help some models stabilize their tool-calling behavior. Each warmup round costs a small number of tokens.
copilot-adapter.config.pricingCurrency.d: Currency used to display per-token pricing on the model hover card. Leave `Auto` to follow VS Code language (zh → CNY, else USD).
How long to cache the account balance query result before re-fetching. Select `Off` to disable caching (fetch on every model list request).
copilot-adapter.config.tokenRatio.descri: Default chars-per-token ratio for estimating token counts. Models and providers may override this with their own `tokenRatio` trait unless **Token Ratio: Global Override** is enabled. Lower for Chinese-heavy content (1.0-2.0), higher for English (around 4.0).
Force all models to use the default chars-per-token ratio set above, ignoring model traits and auto-calibration results.
copilot-adapter.config.tokenRatioAutoCal: Automatically tune the chars-per-token ratio over time based on actual API usage data.
copilot-adapter.config.tokenRatioCalibra: Minimum relative change (0.01–1.0) required before the auto-calibrated ratio is updated. For example, 0.1 means the ratio must change by at least 10% to trigger a calibration update. Lower values allow finer adjustments.
